creator: cy@FreeBSD.org
text:
Most of the submitted patch has been committed. There is a disagreement on whether the user should specify DOCS *AND* DOCSHTML/DOCSPDF. I disagree that having the user specify both is a POLA violation.

Discussion continues at https://github.com/neirbowj/fbsd-krb5-ports/commit/afaf6b2a74bb9cbb1ccb70173622994e479a8e99#commitcomment-21407074
